title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Praising Oneself Inoffensively
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Praising Oneself Inoffensively.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Praising Oneself Inoffensively.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Praising Oneself Inoffensively': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
